stableFifthHandler.verifiedInvariant: Texture table order, TextureIndex references, shared relationships, and metadata survive save/reopen

authorization.ver5SelectionRule: non-atultimateblade Ver5 IMG with genericAllowedFrameCount + specializedWeaponReviewFrameCount > 0
authorization.specializedWeaponRule: weapon-risk is authorized only for shape, alpha, detail, variant, and shared-texture preserving cold-blue recolor
authorization.ver2SelectionRule: flowmindadvanced seven Ver2 IMG and 42 frames use a separate same-format ARGB config
authorization.commonSelectionRule: all four exact common inventory candidates are selected; autoguard_none.img is isolated in a StableFifthHandler supplemental component
authorization.sharedTextureRule: expand hardExcludedByReason ranges and propagate exclusions through every shared TextureIndex reference
authorization.unchangedImgRule: omit or fail unchanged authorized IMG
authorization.postInventoryGateRule: exclude no-visible-color-change whole IMG; StableFifthHandler restores proven Texture-order cases; preserve isolated warm-pixel textures by frame unless doing so leaves the entire IMG unchanged, in which case exclude that whole IMG

classifications: shared-generic except four exact common IMG
